new_classes.label_en: Other sparkling wine, in containers holding > 2 l (CN 2204 10 96)
new_classes.label_de: Anderer Schaumwein, in Behältnissen mit einem Inhalt von mehr als 2 l (KN 2204 10 96)
new_classes.definition_en: Sparkling wine of fresh grapes (CN heading 2204 10) that bears neither the Champagne designation nor the Prosecco PDO designation, presented in containers holding more than 2 litres.

coverage_explanation: The four key discriminating criteria are captured: (1) the product is a sparkling wine (SparklingWineQuality), (2) it originates from fresh grapes (FreshGrapeOriginQuality), (3) it bears neither the Champagne nor Prosecco PDO designation (OtherSparklingWineDesignationQuality — already present in the TBox for 22041094), and (4) it is presented in containers holding more than 2 litres (LargeContainer, ≥ 2 L). A slight gap exists because the legal note defers entirely to the Sub-heading Note 1 of Chapter 22 (pressure criterion ≥ 3 bar at 20 °C for sparkling wine), which cannot be expressed as a decimalRange restriction here without a domain-specific property on the beverage itself (hasExcessPressureAtTwentyDegrees is already in the TBox but its domain/range linkage to the beverage class rather than packaging is not yet modelled). The sibling disjointness complement restriction pointing to OtherSparklingWineSmallContainer22041094 helps discriminate by container size. The coverage score is set to 0.85 to reflect the incomplete modelling of the overpressure threshold from Sub-heading Note 1.
